title: nsk1 - kernel-powered neurosymbolic internals, first decisive experiment: training-free kernel-keyed steering write-back (patchscope-read -> exact-match -> kot-axiom hop-1 -> B2 steering) vs the SAME engine feedback as external text at matched budget, on covered 2-hop composition at R1-R2; Stage-0 = B5 back-patch diagnostic with a rescuable-fraction family-kill floor (flagship line neurosym-kernel-internals; consolidates B1/B2/B5 for this record)

dependent_vars.name: exact_correct
dependent_vars.definition: generated answer exact-matches the generator graph-traversal gold surface form (gold is INDEPENDENT of the engine accept test: the engine resolves hop-1 only and never sees or scores the 2-hop gold - the f2b oracle-leakage lesson)

dependent_vars.name: rescued
dependent_vars.definition: some (source-layer, target-layer) back-patch in the pinned grid yields the exact gold answer on a text-only failure item

dependent_vars.name: fired
dependent_vars.definition: the loop resolved a licensed hop-1 and applied a write (must be ~0 on uncovered controls - false-fire gate)

dependent_vars.name: abstained
dependent_vars.definition: the exact-match mapper abstained on the patchscope readout (out-of-lexicon); X3: matching is exact only, no kernel-space cosine/kNN anywhere

dependent_vars.name: extra_tokens
dependent_vars.definition: per-arm extra token budget actually consumed (internal: patchscope side-decode <=8; external-text: feedback sentence <=24); FLOP ledger reported alongside on the V vector as descriptive secondaries

arms_mandatory_baselines: external-text: the SAME engine hop-1 feedback rendered as text via an external F2-topology loop at matched extra-token budget - the PRIMARY comparator (kernel-outside vs kernel-inside)
kernel-as-text null (static kernel/world records as text at matched budget, no engine resolution - Law 2)
shuffled-kernel (seed-pinned DERANGEMENT of the entity->steering-vector map; plumbing identical, kernel keying destroyed)
noop-hook (hook installed, zero vector - prices the plumbing)

n_planned.calibration_note: 10% covered calibration split (seed-pinned, excluded from final analysis) mechanically selects L* (FK-NSK-2 rule) and alpha (FK-NSK-5 rule) and runs the skeptic-memo item-2 external-arm sanity check (external-text > text-only by >=2pp on calibration) BEFORE freeze-eligibility
n_planned.stage0_patch_grid: pinned (source-layer, target-layer) grid, source > target, stride pruned to <=40 cells per model; grid literal fixed at freeze from the model's layer count
n_planned.stage0_floor: Wilson-LB(rescued/swept) >= 0.15 at each rung, else FAIL (family cheap kill; Stage-1 does not run)
n_planned.write_channel: FK-NSK-1 option (a): kernel-keyed cached steering vectors - per-(model, entity) vectors extracted ONCE, training-free, by contrastive activation arithmetic over the model's OWN activations on 16 pinned carrier prompts; injection h <- h + alpha*v at L*; addressing is EXACT record identity. Law 1: no raw kernel/encoder coordinates ever enter the model. Option (b) kernel-gated activation modulation is the registered fallback (variant V2), out of this record
n_planned.rung_conjunction: PASS requires the primary and specificity bounds to clear at BOTH rungs (IUT); the analysis fields are the per-rung minima
n_planned.mock_note: the committed analysis (mock stage) computes single-pseudo-rung fields over the mock rows; the freeze revision computes per-rung fields and their IUT minima - analysis_script re-pins at freeze
n_planned.coverage_restatement: m0b coverage 0.3542 @ molecules-v0 is corpus-indexed on the pinned TinyStories task family on ONE incomplete kernel instance (ASM-0001) and does NOT describe nsk1-eval; nsk1-eval covered-stratum coverage is BY CONSTRUCTION and verified by a run-time gate (every covered item's hop-1 resolves licensed)
n_planned.power: paired binary, n=1000 covered per rung; planning values acc(external-text) 0.45-0.60, target delta +0.05 absolute, discordant rate 0.25-0.35 => McNemar-style power ~0.8-0.9 at one-sided alpha=0.05; TOST +/-0.02 decidable inside the headroom window enforced by the headroom gate
n_planned.successors: staged variants V2-V7 of idea-neurosym-kernel-internals (gated activation modulation; VSA engine internals; kernel-keyed embedding injection; engine-in-decode; latent loop; trained-bridge latent) register separately under their own gates

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

pins.harness_manifest: runner poc/nsk1/nsk1_runner.py sha256 17d40b6ee3f7d6f5d2b57e0ee3b4c6d5af73203d5836cc3758719c2f0b80386b (mock-green 2026-07-10, $0); generator poc/nsk1/gen_nsk1_corpus.py sha256 b7beac286c0fcfead23c9fcd9f0257142263e43c2f8cacbd4e2e4467f102c099 (output pinned via nsk1-eval digest); engine tools/axiom/kot_axiom.py sha256 b622694022000367349b158aea5322e63677379521c47b29a9d62f2e86e46ccf (the l3a artifact as currently extended - define-op added post-l3a-freeze; l3a envelope regression re-run applies at nsk1 freeze); real-mode HF harness is runner-role work against the FROZEN record and re-pins here

endpoints.test: PRIMARY (exactly one, ABSOLUTE - never a ratio, the F2 degenerate-denominator lesson): paired absolute accuracy delta acc(internal) - acc(external-text) on the covered stratum; one-sided 95% BCa bootstrap lower bound (B=2000, seed pinned); the recorded field is the IUT minimum across R1 and R2; superiority iff > 0

TOST equivalence reading: 90% BCa CI of the primary delta inside +/-0.02 at both rungs => NULL verdict (kernel-inside adds nothing over kernel-outside at these rungs) - recorded with the same prominence as PASS

kernel-keying specificity (co-gate in the PASS rule): one-sided 95% BCa LB of acc(internal) - acc(shuffled) > 0 at both rungs; clears only if the deranged map loses the effect (E9-defl discipline); absolute difference, no ratio
Holm family with sec-specificity, sec-external-value, sec-kernel-as-text contrasts: does the internal loop beat no-feedback at all
does the external F2-topology loop itself work here (replicates the F2 shape at hop-1 granularity); also the skeptic-memo item-2 vacuousness check at campaign scale

Stage-0 B5 diagnostic: Wilson 95% one-sided LB of rescued/swept text-only failures; >= 0.15 required at each rung else the FAIL family-kill rule fires; also the ceiling estimate reported for the family
descriptive V-ledger: matched extra-token budgets (internal <=8 side-decode vs external-text <=24 feedback) plus FLOP/latency ledger; no cost claim is tested in this record

kill_criterion_verbatim: docs/design-neurosym-kernel-internals.md section 4.5 (verbatim): '1. INSTRUMENT-INVALID if any instrument gate fails. 2. FAIL (family cheap kill) if Stage-0 Wilson-LB < 0.15 at either rung. 3. KILL-semantics-free co-gate: PASS additionally requires one-sided 95% LB of acc(internal) - acc(shuffled) > 0 at both rungs; if the primary clears but this does not, the verdict is FAIL-attribution (the write channel works but kernel-keying adds nothing - the E9-defl discipline). 4. PASS: primary LB > 0 at both rungs AND (3) holds. 5. NULL-EQUIV: TOST holds at both rungs => equivalence recorded with the same prominence as a PASS. 6. Anything else: INCONCLUSIVE (report CIs; no adjective).' Instrument gates with their own bounds: patchscope extraction-failure Wilson-UB <= 0.30 (covered, loop arms); mapper abstention on covered <= 0.20; steering-cache extraction success >= 0.90 of entities (calibration); intervention false-fire Wilson-UB <= 0.05 on uncovered controls; headroom: text-only covered accuracy in [0.05, 0.85] with >= 500 scored items.
extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Measured range on any outcome: R1-R2 (SmolLM2-135M/360M), ONE synthetic covered 2-hop task family (nsk1-eval, all facts in-context), ONE kernel instance's minted concepts (mother-of/father-of/man/woman), ONE write channel (B2 kernel-keyed cached steering, alpha and L* rule-selected on a disjoint calibration split), k=1 loop cadence, ONE engine build. A PASS licenses exactly: 'at these two rungs, on this covered synthetic family, kernel-engine content delivered by internal steering beat the same content delivered as text at matched budget' - a sign (2 rungs), no scale adjectives, no slope. It does NOT license: natural-corpus or public-benchmark claims, NL-parse claims, any statement at R3+, multi-hop beyond 2, other write channels, training-time or trained-bridge claims, efficiency-thesis claims, or any 'the kernel powers the network' headline. A FAIL or NULL kills/demotes the training-free internal-write family at these rungs and redirects the line to external seams (L0/L3) and later staged variants under their own gates. Stage-0's rescuable fraction extrapolates only to this task family at these rungs (ASM-0024 resolution).

runner_constraints.gate: Tier-2 GPU spend REQUIRES maintainer sign-off + prereg-freeze of this record + skeptic-memo item-2 calibration check; design-stage harness refuses real mode (ERR_NSK1_GPU_GATED); the final campaign is runner-role work (run != audit) - the designer identity that built this record never runs, grades, or audits it
